query:
SELECT 
  ci.id,
  ci.title,
  ci.description,
  ci.modality,
  ci.format,
  ci.duration_minutes,
  ci.difficulty,
  ci.capability_domain,
  ci.level,
  ci.provider,
  ci.is_active,
  ci.tags,
  ci.created_at
FROM content_items ci
ORDER BY ci.capability_domain, ci.level, ci.title
LIMIT 300;
